data.title: CPI Card Group Inc. will host a webcast on March 5, 2026, to discuss its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results.
data.description: Littleton, Colorado-based CPI Card Group Inc., listed on Nasdaq as PMTS, a leading payments technology firm offering various payment solutions, revealed it will conduct a webcast and conference call on March 5, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to talk about its financial performance in Q4 and full year of 2025. The company's Q4 financial results are set to be disclosed before the market opens on the same day.

data.title: Sandisk Corp (NASDAQ: SNDK) to participate in upcoming investor conferences on Feb 25, Mar 3, and more.
data.description: Sandisk Corporation (NASDAQ: SNDK) from Milpitas, California, announced their participation in upcoming investor conferences: Bernstein Insights: What’s Next in Tech? 4th Annual TMT Forum on February 25, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. PT / 6:30 p.m. ET; Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 3, 2026, at 4:50 p.m. PT / 7:50 p.m. ET; and Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference on a date to be announced.

data.title: Florida is ranked #1 in workforce education, reaching this goal five years early, fulfilling executive order 19-31.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida on February 19, 2026, Governor Ron DeSantis celebrated Career and Technical Education (CTE) month by declaring that Florida has secured the top spot in the United States for workforce education. This accomplishment, in compliance with Executive Order 19-31, was achieved five years earlier than the targeted year of 2030.

data.title: Blue Owl Capital's decision to restrict investors from demanding set funds raises concerns in the private credit sector.
data.description: Concerns arose in the private credit industry after the lender disclosed a new policy preventing investors from requesting a predetermined sum from its funds. This announcement has raised alarms among investors and industry professionals about the implications on the sector’s stability and potential impacts on investment strategies.

data.title: Luxury cruising industry shifts focus to personalization, with affluent travelers choosing ships based on vibe and lifestyle fit instead of brand alone. Seattle, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Wealthy travelers are now selecting cruise ships based on their atmosphere, principles, and compatibility with their lifestyle, rather than solely on brand reputation. A subtle yet important shift is taking place in luxury cruising as the small-ship sector grows. Traditional hotel companies known for their presence on land are increasingly venturing into the sea. This evolution reflects a changing preference among upscale travelers for personalized experiences and a sense of community while at sea. This trend emphasizes the importance of a ship's ambiance and offerings beyond its name recognition.

data.title: Attorney Mitchell A. Stone discusses search and seizure rights in HelloNation for clarity on police conduct in Florida.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 19, 2026, a recent article titled "Understanding Search and Seizure Rights" by defense attorney Mitchell A. Stone, P.A. delves into the protections individuals have during police searches. Addressing the concerns around this topic, the article offers crucial insights on the measures individuals can take when faced with a search situation. This information can be pivotal as individuals navigate encounters with law enforcement, with Stone highlighting key rights that individuals possess during searches. These insights can play a significant role in ensuring that individuals are aware of their rights and can advocate for themselves effectively in such situations.

data.title: Zillow and Google partner to provide home-buying guidance on NotebookLM platform; AI revolutionizes decision-making.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Seattle, a partnership between Zillow and Google is revolutionizing how individuals approach significant life choices with the help of AI. The collaboration aims to provide swift, precise, and dependable responses to the intricate decisions involved in purchasing a home. Through an innovative platform called NotebookLM, users can now access valuable guidance to navigate the complex and high-stakes process of home buying. This partnership marks a milestone in leveraging technology to offer efficient solutions to consumers seeking clarity in crucial life decisions.

data.title: Telix Pharma reports strong FY 2025 results with revenue reaching US$803.8M (up 56%), US$157.1M invested in R&D, US$39.5M in adjusted EBITDA. Telix Precision Medicine segment revenue grew by 22% to US$216.4M, maintaining a 64% gross margin. RLS achieved positive adjusted EBITDA contribution, TMS reported a loss of US$21.7M. Telix Therapeutics focused on late-stage assets with significant R&D investment. FY 2026 revenue guidance is US$950M - US$970M. CEO optimistic about growth in Precision Medicine and therapeutic pipeline.
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Ltd announced their financial results for 2025, with revenue of US$803.8 million, growing by 56% from the previous year. They invested US$157.1 million in R&D, had an adjusted EBITDA of US$39.5 million, and a non-material loss before tax of US$5.3 million. The year-end cash balance was US$141.9 million. Telix Precision Medicine segment revenue grew by 22%, with an adjusted EBITDA of US$216.4 million. Telix also made progress in regulatory filings for their products. In the Therapeutics segment, they invested US$98.0 million in R&D for late-stage assets. Telix forecasts 2026 Group Revenue to be between US$950 million to US$970 million with R&D expenditure guidance of US$200 million to US$240 million. Telix continues to focus on strengthening their therapeutic pipeline and expanding Precision Medicine opportunities.

data.title: Blue Owl's recent decision is causing concerns in private credit as investors lose ability to request set fund amounts.
data.description: The recent announcement from a private lender has caused concern within the private credit industry as they disclosed that investors will no longer have the option to request a specific sum of money back from their investment funds. This move has sparked new worries and discussions within the industry.

data.title: Insurance expert explains why auto insurance rates are higher in northern Minnesota compared to other parts of the state due to severe weather.
data.description: In Roseau, Minnesota on February 19, 2026, a recent article aims to explain why auto insurance rates are frequently elevated in northern areas of the state in comparison to elsewhere. The piece discusses various factors contributing to this issue, particularly the impact of severe weather conditions. Through closer examination, drivers are provided insights into the reasons for these regional pricing variations.
